faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Our cockroach extermination service in White Plains ranges from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. This flat-rate pricing includes inspection, treatment, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in White Plains?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout White Plains and Westchester County. Our team understands that cockroach infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize emergency calls to get your property treated as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in White Plains homes?
faqs.answer: White Plains properties most commonly experience German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and sewers, and Oriental cockroaches in damp areas. Our treatment plans are customized based on the specific species infesting your property for maximum effectiveness.

faqs.question: Is your cockroach treatment safe for families and pets in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against cockroaches while being safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at times convenient for your household.
